title: The Plaza Becomes the Battlefield
description: On pages 16–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is the plaza becomes the battlefield.
scene: The scene follows the plaza becomes the battlefield, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ryuuguu Palace indoor pool

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I HAVE FOUND ITITITTITTITTITTITTITTITTIT!! OUR RAY OF HOPEEE EEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For some reason all of the people who were here before seem to have left the palace almost completely empty...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: but it seems that papagg- San was left behind...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...since when have you been able to do that...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This guy is getting creepier and creepier...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh yes, it was the funniest thing! One day when I was kneeling down and praying a little...

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: ...My soul just suddenly slipped right out! Yahaha hoho!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can float around and peek through walls...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why, the day I first got this ability...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...what do you think I did..?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm jealous!!! zero, I'm so jealous of this guy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oh, shut up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, Brook!! Why don't you go and ask popping...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to go and find the keys to our chains! And the keys to this cage, the keys to this room...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Just tell him to bring one of my swords.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No need for all that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'll slice through the lot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Gueh h...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That ... Also works ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wait a moment!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: PAPPAGG- SAAAN!! It's ONLY MEEEE!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We're in quite a hurry!! We need you to find a key... I mean, a sword!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aaaaaana Arghhh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Stay away from me, ghost!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Kizaru "Unclear Justice

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: (Al Capone's birthday)

summary: The Plaza Becomes the Battlefield. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
